expected.notes: Owner residency is us_resident instead of outside_us, breaking the single condition required to fire advisory_boi_foreign.

probe_intent:
Generate a synthetic case where the engine must NOT fire rule 'advisory_boi_foreign', but that structurally resembles a case that WOULD fire it. Produce a case where ONE of the rule's conditions is deliberately not satisfied while the others are. Rule conditions:
  - answers.owner_residency eq outside_us
No real PII or real-looking government identifiers.
